name.description: Unique internal name for the case template. Used in integrations and API references.

displayName.description: Human-friendly name shown in the UI. Optional.

titlePrefix.description: Prefix automatically added to case titles created from this template.

description.description: Detailed description of the template purpose and usage. Supports markdown.

severity.description: Default severity for cases created from this template (1=LOW, 2=MEDIUM, 3=HIGH, 4=CRITICAL).

tags.description: Default tags applied to cases created from this template.

flag.description: Whether cases created from this template are flagged by default.

summary.description: Default summary text for cases created from this template.

tasks.description: Template tasks that will be created in cases using this template.

mandatory.description: Whether the task must be completed before closing the case.

customFields.description: Default custom field values. Can be a map of field name to value, or an array of custom field objects.

pageTemplateIds.description: IDs of page templates to link to this case template.
